steps.title: Join two full clauses
steps.content: The sentence first says Simpson's work challenges notions of race, gender, history, and memory. Then it adds another full clause: she is credited with expanding conceptual photographic art. Two independent clauses need a comma plus a coordinating conjunction.

steps.title: Avoid run-on punctuation
steps.content: Choice A uses only a comma, creating a comma splice. Choice B has the conjunction but lacks the comma needed between full clauses. Choice C leaves the clauses fused with no punctuation or conjunction. The remaining choice provides the comma and 'and' needed to join them. The answer is D.
